task: Rename chief-app to 塔罗镜, retheme launcher icon, fork to an independent Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle repo + GitHub release
summary:
Chairman: '给app换个名字:塔罗镜 然后换个符合塔罗牌的APP图标,然后给仓库上传一下(新的,仿照算卦就行)'.

What this event delivers:

A. chief-app renamed to 塔罗镜 (was 星辰之镜).
   - apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml: label
     '塔罗镜'.
   - apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/java/com/thatgfsj/chief/
     ui/oracle/TarotScreen.kt: Header text '塔罗镜'.

B. Launcher icon redesigned in the chairman's chosen
   palette (紫黑金, matches the in-app starfield theme).
   - apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/res/drawable/
     ic_launcher_foreground.xml: gold tarot-card outline
     (#D4AF37, strokeWidth 3) on a 100×100 inner-border
     rectangle, with a 5-pointed star (#D4AF37 fill) at
     the centre and two champagne dots (#F5E7A0) at the
     bottom corners. Matches the in-app '星辰之镜' tarot-
     mirror iconography.
   - apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml:
     ic_launcher_background changed from #00897B (teal,
     IChingOracle inheritance) to #0D052E (deep purple,
     the app's actual background).

C. Independent repository created and pushed:
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle
   - Initial commit 'c58d749' on main branch.
   - Layout mirrors IChingOracle: app/ (Kotlin source +
     resources), gradle/ + gradlew + gradlew.bat,
     build.gradle.kts, settings.gradle.kts (rootProject
     name = 'tarot-oracle'), gradle.properties,
     local.properties, .gitignore, README.md,
     DEVELOPMENT.md. Per chairman: '仿照算卦就行'.
   - Package renamed com.thatgfsj.chief →
     com.thatgfsj.tarot (sed-replaced in all .kt files
     + namespace in app/build.gradle.kts).

D. GitHub release v0.1.0 on the new repo:
   - https://github.com/Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle/releases/
     tag/v0.1.0
   - Asset: tarot-oracle-v0.1.0-debug.apk
     (14,145,435 bytes, 14.7 MB)
   - Release body describes features, tech, boundary.

E. APK also copied to the chairman's desktop as
   C:/Users/thatg/Desktop/tarot-oracle-v0.1.0-debug.apk
   for direct install via adb.

F. The Flwntier repo (Thatgfsj/Flwntier) still has
   apps/ChiefApp/ as the source-of-truth (the
   migration to the new repo hasn't happened; chairman
   wanted a 'new repo' so we FORKED, not moved). The
   Flwntier repo is now an 'also-contains-tarot-oracle'
   layout; v0.2.0 chief-app under apps/ChiefApp/ is
   identical to the new-repo's content. The new repo's
   main branch IS the canonical source going forward
   (since the chairman said '新的,仿照算卦就行').

BOUNDARY (NWT 000071 + 000073 still hold):
- tarot-oracle is NOT a Flwntier release product. It
  is its own independent product (Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle).
- The APK has its own release (v0.1.0) on its own
  GitHub repo. Flwntier's own releases page (v0.4.22)
  is the desktop NSIS only.
- 塔罗牌 is still the chairman's own end-to-end smoke
  test, not a Flwntier feature.

FILES TOUCHED:
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/java/com/thatgfsj/chief/
    ui/oracle/TarotScreen.kt
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/res/drawable/
    ic_launcher_foreground.xml
- apps/ChiefApp/app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml
- (new) https://github.com/Thatgfsj/tarot-oracle
  (entire repository content: app/, gradle/, README.md,
  DEVELOPMENT.md, .gitignore, etc.)
- .nwt/timeline/000077.json (this file)
reason: Chairman: '给app换个名字:塔罗镜 然后换个符合塔罗牌的APP图标,然后给仓库上传一下(新的,仿照算卦就行)'. Three deliverables: rename, retheme, fork to a new independent repo modeled on IChingOracle. All three done; APK on the new GitHub release.
